mapper.select: SELECT * FROM employee_careers WHERE emp_no = #{empNo} ORDER BY end_date IS NULL DESC, end_date DESC, start_date DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO employee_careers (emp_no, company_name, department, position, start_date, end_date, description, sort_order) VALUES (#{empNo}, #{companyName}, #{department}, #{position}, #{startDate}, #{endDate}, #{description}, #{sortOrder})
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM employee_careers WHERE id = #{id} AND emp_no = #{empNo}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM employee_educations WHERE emp_no = #{empNo} ORDER BY end_date DESC, id DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO employee_educations (emp_no, school_name, major, degree, start_date, end_date, graduation_status, sort_order) VALUES (#{empNo}, #{schoolName}, #{major}, #{degree}, #{startDate}, #{endDate}, #{graduationStatus}, #{sortOrder})
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM employee_educations WHERE id = #{id} AND emp_no = #{empNo}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM employee_certificates WHERE emp_no = #{empNo} ORDER BY acquired_date DESC, id DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO employee_certificates (emp_no, cert_name, issuer, acquired_date, expiry_date, sort_order) VALUES (#{empNo}, #{certName}, #{issuer}, #{acquiredDate}, #{expiryDate}, #{sortOrder})
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM employee_certificates WHERE id = #{id} AND emp_no = #{empNo}
